rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementations
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for range assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Declare helper variables with explicit types matching their expressions
Formulate guarantees as boolean expressions tied to visible identifiers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for boolean helper declarations in AGREE
Ensure all identifiers in contracts are visible in the component scope
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts
Do not define range assumptions without concrete bounds or visible relations
